case_title: KANG CHAN VS. GEE HOW OAK TIN ASSN. OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, KANG AS TO DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAK TIN ASSN. OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, KANG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $10.00 SERVED MAR-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAK TIN ASSN. OF AMERICA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAK TIN ASSN. OF AMERICA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-15-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. YESTERDAY THE DEFENDANT WAS NOTIFIED THAT THE ASSOCIATION CORPORATE STATUS WAS SUSPENDED BY THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE. DEFENDANT REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE TO CLEAR THE SUSPENSION. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. EDWIN CHAN APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERKS: S. VANTREE AND L. FONG. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAK TIN ASSN. OF AMERICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KANG CHAN & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE EDWIN CHAN, PRESIDENT OF GEE HOW OAK TIN ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA. INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE, BUT MR. CHAN WAIVED SERVICE ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, KANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEE HOW OAK TIN ASSN. OF AMERICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
